workshoptitle: Monetize Your APIs for the Agentic Web: Build an x402 Payment Gateway on OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop overview, architecture, objectives, prerequisites, and lab sequence.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Provision OCI Infrastructure
tutorials.description: Use Cloud Shell automation to create the Autonomous Database, API Gateway, Functions application, and network foundation.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Expose SH Data with ORDS AutoREST
tutorials.description: Use a SQL helper to expose selected SH sample data through X402_REST views and verify the generated REST API.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Deploy x402 Middleware as an OCI Function
tutorials.description: Create the x402 receipts store and deploy the provided Node.js payment middleware as an OCI Function.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Integrate x402 with API Gateway and the SH Data REST API
tutorials.description: Use a route helper to wire API Gateway routes to the x402 middleware function.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Test With an Agent Client
tutorials.description: Generate and run a Node.js agent-style client that pays for one SH-derived sales query.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Verify Idempotency and Payment Receipts
tutorials.description: Replay a saved payment signature and inspect payment receipts in Autonomous Database.

tutorials.title: Lab 7 (Optional): Polish Responses With OCI Generative AI
tutorials.description: Optionally enrich paid data responses with OCI Generative AI summaries.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Troubleshooting and Next Steps
tutorials.description: Review common fixes and next steps for taking the pattern further.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving LiveLabs help.
